problem_solved: Patient intake process is manual and time-consuming, missing opportunities to screen for social determinants and collect payments
solution_description: Patient intake and engagement platform with integrated SDOH screening capabilities. Automates check-in, payment collection, and clinical intake while capturing social determinants data. Provides analytics on patient populations and supports multiple screening tools including PRAPARE and HRSN
notes: Patient intake platform with SDOH screening. High Varden fit - automates SDOH data collection at point of care. Strong commercial traction as public company. Scales SDOH screening efficiently. Key infrastructure for systematic SDOH data capture
